title: RRP x BTC Microstructure x DeFi Yield
notes: Requires FRED_API_KEY for the RRP observation. DefiLlama yields is large and should be prefetched or cached before dense fan-out.

entries.text: The reverse-repo balance is a useful liquidity-plumbing surface because it can shift even when the louder macro conversation is focused somewhere else. A current RRP observation is valuable in this mixed session because it gives the public rates complex a compact funding-state anchor before the manifest moves on to Bitcoin mempool structure and DeFi yield surfaces.

The raw mempool transaction count is a clean public microstructure observation because it describes immediate Bitcoin backlog without needing exchange price at all. Including it here gives the session a simple onchain congestion surface that can be compared against both the public funding backdrop and the more yield-oriented DeFi state captured by the third post.

DefiLlama’s yield-pools dataset is oversized for bursty use, but it remains one of the best public DeFi yield surfaces once prefetched. Set against RRP and mempool congestion, it supports a cleaner analysis question: is capital still being paid to sit in stable-yield venues while public funding plumbing and Bitcoin settlement demand remain comparatively contained?
